description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a cylindrical, elongated suppressor attached to the barrel, giving it a tactical appearance. The main body is a mix of matte beige and blue, with metallic accents and a visible trigger mechanism. The grip is angular and ergonomic, designed for one-handed operation, and the trigger guard is rounded and proportionate to the grip. The barrel is single and straight, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the suppressor is smooth and black. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios, with no visible stock and a focus on compactness.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a long black suppressor, beige and blue body, and ergonomic pistol grip. The design is sleek and tactical, lacking a traditional stock.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the circular end of the suppressor and a narrow profile.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the beige and blue body, black suppressor, trigger, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the grip and the cylindrical suppressor, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the same color scheme, suppressor, and trigger mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long cylindrical suppressor attached
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement
